title: Add Capability
description: Add a hexagonal capability port + a chosen provider adapter (or a raw `none` gateway) to an existing service. The footprint — env / compose-service / runner / none — follows from the provider.

service.description: The service to add the capability to (directory name under services/, or a path to the service root).
service.x-prompt: Which service should the capability be added to?

capability.description: The capability to add (must exist in the capability registry).
capability.x-prompt: Which capability do you want to add?

provider.description: The provider that satisfies the port. Defaults to the capability's default provider. Use `none` for a raw gateway (port + stub + red contract test, to be built as a bet).

stack.description: Language stack of the target service. Auto-detected from the service when omitted (e.g. pyproject.toml -> python).
